description: Composition100% cotton (180 gsm), Crew neck half sleeves t-shirt 1982 World Cup was held in Spain. Italy won the tournament. Italy became the first team to qualify for second round without winning a game in group stage.Those nice fabrics, the cool colours, the easy and relaxed Fit are few of the things that come to mind when one thinks of t-shirts. The perfect casual wear ever created by humans. So easy to wear and comfortable. The popularity of t-shirts is soaring and it so seems a life without a t-shirt is unthinkable for some. It's a no holds barred addiction people just can't get rid of. The multitude of colours, designs, fits and sizes that T-shirts come in are a tribute to the astounding craze for T-shirts. The eternal favourite for one and all. Go for your T-shirts right away.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in T-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-17.5"
